findings.description: MetricsTimeSeriesPanel still contains synthetic frontend fallback for 30s/1m via buildSyntheticBuckets/normalizeHistory, directly violating the requested backend-native bucket architecture.
MetricsTimeSeriesPanel references shouldUseFallbackSource, but that identifier is undefined. This is a compile-time/runtime blocker.
MetricsAreaChart contains duplicated/trailing corrupted JSX text after the component closes, which will break TypeScript/TSX parsing.

MetricsAreaChart tooltip still renders only the bucket-end timestamp label and does not display backend bucketStart/bucketEnd window, so tooltip handling does not yet accurately reflect backend bucket boundaries.
Playwright spec contains duplicated trailing garbage after the final describe block, breaking test parsing and making E2E coverage invalid.
